nK.description: Number of floors in the tower

nJ.description: Number of distinct apartment floor areas

nA.description: Maximum number of apartments across all configurations

cap.description: Number of apartments in configuration v

jApt.description: Area index of apartment a in configuration v (maps (v, a) to an index in 0..nJ-1)

pProfit.description: Profit per apartment for sector i, area index j, and owner h

area.description: Actual floor area value for area index j

m.description: Minimum floor area required for each sector i and owner h

b.description: Minimum fraction of total apartments that must belong to each sector i

s.description: Minimum average floor area required for apartments in each sector i

o.description: Minimum fraction of total apartments that must belong to each owner class h

hCorp.description: Index of the corporation owner class

assumptions.description: Number of floor configurations is positive.
Number of owner classes is positive.
Number of distinct apartment floor areas is positive.
Maximum number of apartments across all configurations is positive.
cap is non-negative and at most nA for each configuration.

code.python: assert all(0 <= cap[v] <= nA for v in range(nV))

assumptions.description: jApt values are valid area indices.

code.python: assert all(0 <= jApt[v][a] < nJ for v in range(nV) for a in range(cap[v]))
assert all(area[j] >= 0 for j in range(nJ))
assert all(m[i][h] >= 0 for i in range(nI) for h in range(nH))

assumptions.description: Sector fraction lower bounds are non-negative.

code.python: assert all(b[i] >= 0 for i in range(nI))

assumptions.description: Average area lower bounds are non-negative.

code.python: assert all(s[i] >= 0 for i in range(nI))

assumptions.description: Ownership fraction lower bounds are non-negative.

code.python: assert all(o[h] >= 0 for h in range(nH))

assumptions.description: iFree is a valid sector index.
hCorp is a valid owner index.

x.description: 1 if floor k uses configuration v with owner h, 0 otherwise

y.description: 1 if apartment a in configuration v on floor k (with owner h) is assigned to sector i, 0 otherwise
y.indices: (k, v, h, i, a) for k in range(nK) for v in range(nV) for h in range(nH) for i in range(nI) for a in range(cap[v])

constraints.description: Each floor is assigned exactly one configuration and owner.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(gp.quicksum(x[k, v, h] for v in range(nV) for h in range(nH)) == 1 for k in range(nK))

constraints.description: Each apartment on a floor can be assigned to a sector only if the floor uses the matching configuration and owner.
constraints.formulation: \sum_{i \in I} y_{kvhia} \leq x_{kvh} \quad \forall k \in K,\; v \in V,\; h \in H,\; a \in A_v

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(gp.quicksum(y[k, v, h, i, a] for i in range(nI)) <= x[k, v, h] for k in range(nK) for v in range(nV) for h in range(nH) for a in range(cap[v]))

constraints.description: Minimum fraction of total apartments that must be in sector i.
constraints.formulation: \sum_{k} \sum_{v} \sum_{h} \sum_{a \in A_v} y_{kvhia} \geq b_i \sum_{k} \sum_{v} \sum_{h} \sum_{i'} \sum_{a \in A_v} y_{kvhi'a} \quad \forall i \in I

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(gp.quicksum(y[k, v, h, i, a] for k in range(nK) for v in range(nV) for h in range(nH) for a in range(cap[v])) >= b[i] * gp.quicksum(y[k, v, h, ip, a] for k in range(nK) for v in range(nV) for h in range(nH) for ip in range(nI) for a in range(cap[v])) for i in range(nI))

constraints.description: Minimum average floor area for sector i.
constraints.formulation: \sum_{k,v,h,a \in A_v} \text{area}_{j_{va}} \cdot y_{kvhia} \geq s_i \sum_{k,v,h,a \in A_v} y_{kvhia} \quad \forall i \in I

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(gp.quicksum(area[jApt[v][a]] * y[k, v, h, i, a] for k in range(nK) for v in range(nV) for h in range(nH) for a in range(cap[v])) >= s[i] * gp.quicksum(y[k, v, h, i, a] for k in range(nK) for v in range(nV) for h in range(nH) for a in range(cap[v])) for i in range(nI))

constraints.description: Apartments with area below minimum for (sector i, owner h) must have zero assignment.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(y[k, v, h, i, a] == 0 for k in range(nK) for v in range(nV) for h in range(nH) for i in range(nI) for a in range(cap[v]) if area[jApt[v][a]] < m[i][h])

constraints.description: Corporations cannot own free sector apartments.
constraints.formulation: y_{kv\,\text{hCorp}\,\text{iFree}\,a} = 0 \quad \forall k \in K,\; v \in V,\; a \in A_v

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(y[k, v, hCorp, iFree, a] == 0 for k in range(nK) for v in range(nV) for a in range(cap[v]))

constraints.description: Minimum ownership fraction: total apartments assigned to owner h meets o_h times all apartments.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(gp.quicksum(x[k, v, h] * cap[v] for k in range(nK) for v in range(nV)) >= o[h] * gp.quicksum(x[k, v, hp] * cap[v] for k in range(nK) for v in range(nV) for hp in range(nH)) for h in range(nH))

objective.description: Maximize total profit from apartment assignments.
